questions.question: What animals are shown grazing in the pasture?
questions.answer_key: Horses—one dark brown and one brown and white
questions.rationale: Horses are the main subjects; their presence and coloring are essential to understanding the scene.

questions.question: What type of facility or location is shown in the middle frames?
questions.answer_key: An equestrian or horse facility with flags, manicured grounds, and formal entrance
questions.rationale: Setting context is essential; the formal facility with flags distinguishes this from a simple farm.

questions.question: What logo or branding appears in the bottom left corner of the frames?
questions.rationale: On-screen text/branding is a standard AD element; identifies the source or sponsor of the footage.

questions.question: What is depicted on the sign at the entrance of the property?
questions.answer_key: A silhouette of a horse in motion or running
questions.rationale: The sign reinforces the equestrian theme and is a visible landmark in the opening frames.

questions.question: What is the horse doing in the final frames among the trees?
questions.answer_key: Standing or moving through wooded area with rope or lead attached
questions.rationale: Describes the transition from pasture to forest setting and the horse's controlled movement.
